=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/test.ts(1,1): warning TS377051: Multiple versions of package 'my-effect-lib' detected: 1.0.0 @ /node_modules/my-effect-lib, 2.0.0 @ /node_modules/wrapper/node_modules/my-effect-lib. Consider cleaning up your lockfile, or add 'my-effect-lib' to allowedDuplicatedPackages to suppress this warning. effect(duplicatePackage)

      "compilerOptions": {
        "plugins": [
          {
            "name": "@effect/language-service"

==== /.src/test.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377051: Multiple versions of package 'my-effect-lib' detected: 1.0.0 @ /node_modules/my-effect-lib, 2.0.0 @ /node_modules/wrapper/node_modules/my-effect-lib. Consider cleaning up your lockfile, or add 'my-effect-lib' to allowedDuplicatedPackages to suppress this warning. effect(duplicatePackage)
    import { foo } from "my-effect-lib"
    import { bar } from "wrapper"
    
    const program = Effect.succeed(foo + bar)
